questions.question_text: Define Tauheed. What is its impact on individual life and the society? Elaborate.
Give a general estimate of Holy Prophet's (pbuh) character in the battle fields as a commander.
Describe the rights of women in Islam in the context of the current wave of the feminist movement.
Throw light in detail on the moral value system of Islam as a significant feature of Islamic civilization.
Write a comprehensive note on the Hajj (the pilgrimage) system of Islam and its spiritual, moral, and social impacts.
Is extremism a challenge to Islam? Discuss in the context of contemporary challenges faced by the Muslim Ummah.
Give suggestions to reform Pakistani Politics keeping in view the different aspects of the political system of Islam.
